title: olearia lineata
intro: Olearia lineata, also known as the New Zealand tree daisy, is a shrub native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, helping to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Olearia lineata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it is also used topically to apply its anti-inflammatory properties directly to the skin.
